    "Multi-user collaboration on same bid not yet supported"
  ],
  "next_priorities": [
    "Lot model persistence (database schema + API)",
    "Live material pricing integration (RSMeans or similar)",
    "Mobile-responsive UI for on-site use",
    "Multi-user collaboration (shared bid workspace)",
    "Bid template library (by project type)"
  ]
}
